destroy.example: The fire destroyed the old house.
destroy.example_zh: 大火摧毀了那棟老房子。

detect.example: Dogs can detect smells we cannot.
detect.example_zh: 狗能聞到我們聞不到的氣味。

determine.example: Hard work can determine your success.

devil.example: In the story, the devil tricked the man.
devil.example_zh: 在故事裡，魔鬼欺騙了那個人。

dim.example: The light in the room was dim.
Please dim the lights for the movie.

dime.example: A dime is worth ten cents.

dine.example: We dined at a nice restaurant.
dine.example_zh: 我們在一家不錯的餐廳用餐。

dinosaur.example: Dinosaurs lived millions of years ago.
dinosaur.example_zh: 恐龍生活在數百萬年前。

dip.example: She dipped the bread in the soup.
We ate chips with a cheese dip.
dip.example_zh: 我們配起司沾醬吃洋芋片。

dirt.example: His shoes were covered in dirt.

discount.example: The store offers a ten percent discount.

discount.example_zh: 他們把舊款式打折出售。

dishonest.example: It is dishonest to lie to your friends.
dishonest.example_zh: 對朋友說謊是不誠實的。

disk-disc.example: She saved the file on a disk.

dislike.example: She has a strong dislike of spiders.

dive.example: He dived into the cool pool.
The bird made a sudden dive.

dizzy.example: I felt dizzy after spinning around.
dizzy.example_zh: 轉了一圈後我覺得頭暈。

dock.example: The boat is tied to the dock.
The ship docked at the port.

donkey.example: The donkey carried the heavy bags.

dose.example: Take one dose of the medicine each day.

doubtful.example: It is doubtful that he will come.

downtown.example: She works in a downtown office.
downtown.example_zh: 她在市中心的辦公室上班。

drag.example: He dragged the heavy box across the floor.
drag.example_zh: 他把那個重箱子拖過地板。

dragonfly.example: A dragonfly flew over the pond.

drain.example: The water drained out of the sink.

dramatic.example: There was a dramatic change in the weather.
dramatic.example_zh: 天氣出現了劇烈的變化。

drip.example: Water dripped from the broken pipe.
I heard the drip of the tap.
drip.example_zh: 我聽見水龍頭滴水的聲音。

drown.example: Always swim where you can't drown.
drown.example_zh: 一定要在不會溺水的地方游泳。

drugstore.example: I bought medicine at the drugstore.

drunk.example: He never drives when he is drunk.

dumb.example: The shock left him dumb for a moment.
dumb.example_zh: 震驚讓他一時說不出話。

dump.example: Don't dump trash in the river.
They took the old sofa to the dump.
dump.example_zh: 他們把舊沙發載去垃圾場。

dumpling.example: We eat dumplings during the festival.

dust.example: There is dust on the old books.

eager.example: The children are eager to play outside.

echo.example: There was an echo in the empty hall.
Our voices echoed in the cave.
echo.example_zh: 我們的聲音在洞穴裡迴盪。

edit.example: She edited the report before sending it.
edit.example_zh: 她在寄出前修改了報告。

editor.example: The editor checked the article for mistakes.
editor.example_zh: 編輯檢查文章有沒有錯誤。

educational.zh: 教育性的、有教育意義的
educational.example: The museum trip was very educational.
educational.example_zh: 這趟博物館之行很有教育意義。

efficient.example: She found an efficient way to work.
efficient.example_zh: 她找到了有效率的工作方法。

elbow.example: He hurt his elbow playing tennis.
elbow.example_zh: 他打網球時傷到了手肘。

elbow.example: She elbowed her way through the crowd.

elderly.example: We should help the elderly cross the road.
elderly.example_zh: 我們應該幫年長者過馬路。

elect.example: The students elected a new class leader.
elect.example_zh: 學生們選出了新的班長。

election.example: The election will be held next month.

electricity.example: The storm cut off our electricity.
electricity.example_zh: 暴風雨切斷了我們的電力。

electronic.example: She bought a new electronic device.
electronic.example_zh: 她買了一個新的電子裝置。

element.example: Trust is an important element of friendship.
element.example_zh: 信任是友誼的重要元素。

elevator.example: Take the elevator to the fifth floor.

emergency.example: Call this number in an emergency.

emperor.example: The emperor ruled a large empire.
emperor.example_zh: 皇帝統治著一個大帝國。

enable.example: The new tool enables us to work faster.
enable.example_zh: 這個新工具讓我們工作更快。

energetic.example: The puppy is lively and energetic.
energetic.example_zh: 這隻小狗活潑又有活力。

enjoyable.example: We had an enjoyable trip to the beach.
enjoyable.example_zh: 我們的海灘之旅很愉快。

entry.example: The main entry is on the left.
Entry to the museum is free.

envy.example: She felt envy when she saw the prize.
envy.example_zh: 看到那個獎時她滿心羨慕。

excellence.example: The school is known for its excellence.

exchange.example: We exchanged gifts at the party.
exchange.example_zh: 我們在派對上交換禮物。

exhibition.example_zh: 我們參觀了一場藝術展覽。

expectation.example: The result was beyond our expectation.

experiment.example: We did a science experiment in class.
experiment.example_zh: 我們在課堂上做了一個科學實驗。

explode.example: The firework exploded in the sky.

explore.example_zh: 他們探索了那個黑暗的洞穴。
